## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr and GrowthX to discuss content production, workflow improvements, and AirOps integration.](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality has improved significantly; focus now on streamlining review process and increasing production](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Implementing JIRA integration with Airtable for legal review submissions](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Clarification needed on AirOps usage and value proposition for Intoxalock team](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Workflow refinements discussed, including citation methods and keyword targeting strategies](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Production

  - [Content quality has improved to the point where proper English is consistently used](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Currently in week 7 of production plan, with 100 topics identified and 40-70 articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Goal to increase to 15 articles per week once quality is consistently high](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Need to ensure mentions of IIDs, SR22, and FRID insurance in DUI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

### Citation and SEO Optimization

  - [Discussed implementing automated backlinks and citations in content](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Agreed to use a combination of anchor text links and superscript citations with sources listed at the end](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Will utilize provided list of trusted .gov and legal sources for citations](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Workflow and Status Updates in Airtable

  - [Refined status flow: Topic Shortlisted → Approved/Rejected → Content Creation → Brian Review → Jessica Review → Legal Review](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Jessica to mark articles as "Brian to Review" after her review; Brian will then submit to legal](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [JIRA integration to be implemented for automatic ticket creation when status changes to "Legal to Review"](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Content Strategy for Intoxalock vs. DUI.org

  - [Clarified content focus: DUI-related topics for DUI.org, product-specific content for Intoxalock.com](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Added primary keyword and search volume to content briefs for easier evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### AirOps Integration and Utilization

  - [Confusion about AirOps usage and value proposition for Intoxalock team](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [GrowthX using AirOps for workflow development and content production](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Need for clarity on when/how Intoxalock will directly use AirOps platform](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Suggestion for knowledge transfer session on AirOps capabilities and potential use cases](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share email IDs for JIRA access](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Lauren to provide JIRA access for integration setup](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Implement JIRA integration with Airtable within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Schedule knowledge transfer session on AirOps platform usage and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Continue refining content production process and increasing review efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Evaluate content briefs for appropriate placement on DUI.org vs. Intoxalock.com](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Jimmy to connect with Lauren for further discussion on AirOps utilization](https://fathom.video/share/YTHczibpWc7yv7xgXFQMDmuvLfm2BuVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
